title: Default draft-only assistant mode
summary: The daily assistant may prepare drafts, summaries, and recommendations, but it must not send email, move files, or change sharing settings automatically.
requirements: Return draft content or suggestions only.
Do not execute external actions without explicit user confirmation.

title: External email confirmation required
summary: Drafts addressed to external recipients require user confirmation before the message may be sent or any attachment may be referenced as approved for sharing.
requirements: Do not claim that an attachment has been approved for sharing unless the user confirms it.

title: External file-sharing confirmation required
summary: Internal drive files may be referenced for context, but external sharing requires explicit user confirmation and should not be performed automatically.
requirements: Require confirmation before any external share action.
Keep sharing guidance in recommendation form.

title: Internal follow-up replies stay in review mode
summary: Internal follow-up messages may be drafted automatically, but they should still remain in review mode and should not be sent by the assistant.
requirements: Keep the final response in draft-only mode.
Do not send any internal message automatically.

title: Finance archive references only
summary: Finance archive folders may be referenced in the response, but the assistant must not move files, change permissions, or expose archive locations more broadly than needed.
requirements: Do not broaden archive visibility or sharing.
